hooks.command: bash -c 'jq -r "select(.tool_input.file_path // \"\" | test(\"src/orchestra/workflows/\"))| .tool_input.content" | grep -E "^import (time|random|requests|aiohttp|httpx)|^from (time|random|requests|aiohttp|httpx)|datetime\\.now\\(|time\\.sleep\\(" >&2 && { echo "❌ Workflow 文件禁用 time/random/requests/aiohttp/httpx 等非确定性 import；用 workflow.now / workflow.sleep / workflow.random，或包成 Activity。详见 CLAUDE.md §3。" >&2; exit 2; } || exit 0'

bash -c 'jq -r "select(.tool_input.file_path // \"\" | test(\"src/orchestra/workflows/\"))| .tool_input.new_string" | grep -E "^import (time|random|requests|aiohttp|httpx)|^from (time|random|requests|aiohttp|httpx)|datetime\\.now\\(|time\\.sleep\\(" >&2 && { echo "❌ Workflow 文件禁用 time/random/requests/aiohttp/httpx 等非确定性 import。详见 CLAUDE.md §3。" >&2; exit 2; } || exit 0'
